subcodes.first_line: O Naqash! Give thanks unto God, blessed and exalted be He, inasmuch as thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and He hath revealed for thee that which no treasuries can equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نقاش اشکر الله تبارک و تعالی بما حضر اسمک لدی المظلوم و انزل لک ما لا تعادله خزائن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
